title: Sightless
description: This Mod makes you blind in Minecraft all you can see is the white dots outlining blocks. You must feel your way around the world.
body: This mod makes you blind in minecraft you can only see white dots at the corners of each block. and you have no clue whats in your inventory with out feeling it first to feel it open your inventory and hit F on a item with the ??? texture then it will show your item i will suggest to change controls so that when you hit F on a item it doesnt take it to your off-hand, also there are commands to toggle the mod and multiplayer functions and range, there is a blind stick crafted with two sticks and two leads which increases your range. so have fun and i hope this info helps. this mod requires Fabric API
